SELECT toLastDayOfWeek(event_date, 0) AS last_sunday FROM test_dates;
SELECT toLastDayOfWeek(event_date, 1) AS last_monday FROM test_dates;
SELECT event_date, toLastDayOfWeek(event_date, 0) AS last_sunday FROM test_dates WHERE event_date < toDateTime('2023-04-23 00:00:00');
SELECT d.date_field, toLastDayOfWeek(d.date_field) FROM other_dates d;
WITH (SELECT MAX(event_date) FROM test_dates) AS max_date SELECT toLastDayOfWeek(max_date) AS last_sunday;
SELECT t.event_date, toLastDayOfWeek(t.event_date) AS rounded_date FROM test_dates t JOIN other_dates o ON toDate(t.event_date) = o.date_field;

SELECT DISTINCT toLastDayOfWeek(toDateTime('2023-12-30 15:00:00')) AS last_sunday FROM test_dates UNION SELECT DISTINCT toLastDayOfWeek(toDateTime('2023-12-31 15:00:00'), 1) AS last_monday FROM test_dates;
